'''rajate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:kinda|kinda]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-j-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kinda|kinda]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| rajate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:rajate|rajate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:rajatesher|rajatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rajatesherĂ«m|rajatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rajatero|rajatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rajateshĂ«|rajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rajateshĂ«m|rajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirajatero|gokirajatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirajateshĂ«|gokirajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirajateshĂ«m|gokirajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gorajankerom|gorajankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorajankeshĂ«|gorajankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorajankeshĂ«m|gorajankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gorajankeya|gorajankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rajaterom|rajaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rajatemu|rajatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:rajateya|rajateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirajaterom|gokirajaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirajatemu|gokirajatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokirajateya|gokirajateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:rajajate|rajajate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:rajajatesher|rajajatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rajajatesherĂ«m|rajajatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rajajatero|rajajatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rajajateshĂ«|rajajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rajajateshĂ«m|rajajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirajajatero|gokirajajatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirajajateshĂ«|gokirajajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirajajateshĂ«m|gokirajajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gorajajankerom|gorajajankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorajajankeshĂ«|gorajajankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorajajankeshĂ«m|gorajajankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gorajajankeya|gorajajankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rajajaterom|rajajaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rajajatemu|rajajatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:rajajateya|rajajateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirajajaterom|gokirajajaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirajajatemu|gokirajajatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokirajajateya|gokirajajateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:rĂŠjĂŠte|rĂŠjĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:rĂŠjĂŠtesher|rĂŠjĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rĂŠjĂŠtesherĂ«m|rĂŠjĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rĂŠjĂŠtero|rĂŠjĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«|rĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m|rĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirĂŠjĂŠtero|gokirĂŠjĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«|gokirĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m|gokirĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gorĂŠjĂŠnkerom|gorĂŠjĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«|gorĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gorĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gorĂŠjĂŠnkeya|gorĂŠjĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rĂŠjĂŠterom|rĂŠjĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rĂŠjĂŠtemu|rĂŠjĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:rĂŠjĂŠteya|rĂŠjĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirĂŠjĂŠterom|gokirĂŠjĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirĂŠjĂŠtemu|gokirĂŠjĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokirĂŠjĂŠteya|gokirĂŠjĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:rafjafte|rafjafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:rafjaftesher|rafjaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rafjaftesherĂ«m|rafjaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rafjaftero|rafjaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rafjafteshĂ«|rafjafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rafjafteshĂ«m|rafjafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirafjaftero|gokirafjaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirafjafteshĂ«|gokirafjafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirafjafteshĂ«m|gokirafjafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gorafjafnkerom|gorafjafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorafjafnkeshĂ«|gorafjafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorafjafnkeshĂ«m|gorafjafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gorafjafnkeya|gorafjafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rafjafterom|rafjafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rafjaftemu|rafjaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:rafjafteya|rafjafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirafjafterom|gokirafjafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirafjaftemu|gokirafjaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokirafjafteya|gokirafjafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
